_comment: Curated FAOSTAT domain fan-out list for ag.faostat_production. 'code' is the FAOSTAT domain code used in the normalized bulk URL (https://bulks-faostat.fao.org/production/{code}_All_Data_(Normalized).zip). Each file carries all countries/years for that domain. Keep curated (analogs of the USDA NASS/ERS tables) — do not fan out over all ~80 FAOSTAT domains. Domain codes + bulk column names are PENDING LIVE VERIFICATION.
